[[Brigadier]] '''Colin Darkmere''' was a member of the [[New Republic Intelligence Service]],<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|168|Darkmere, Brigadier Colin}}</ref> and part of the [[Intelligence Operations Command]].<ref name="FC" /> During [[Operation Shadow Hand]], Darkmere was tasked with information gathering concerning the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] newest weapon, the [[World Devastator]].<ref name="CSWE" /> In the aftermath of [[Operation Shadow Hand]], Darkmere was in charge of three field command teams, under [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kushone]], [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Daclo Koat-xi]], and [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Keltric]]. After the [[Battle of Calamari]], Darkmere authored a memo to the [[New Republic Provisional Council]] warning of the possibility of a continued Imperial campaign as well as the likely of further World Devastator attacks.<ref name="FC" />
